channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: "Dead Girls Don't Talk"
item.description: A man charged with murder for poisoning two women tells a friend, "dead girls don't talk." Brave survivors speak out on their behalf. "48 Hours" contr...

item.title: Vance in Switzerland for talks; Iran says it's closing Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran's delegation has also arrived in Switzerland for the negotiations.

item.title: Iran live updates: Delegations arrive as US-Iran talks begin in Switzerland
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: In Taylor Swift's beach town, every clue becomes a wedding rumor
item.description: Rumors that Taylor Swift was planning to marry at her Rhode Island home this weekend have drawn fans, photographers and curious visitors to the seaside.
